data.content: Shipment review REJECTED. Two repo-scoping fix commits (c92de1df5bf4 and 3cd8bf7cab57) were never merged to main — they remain on work/foolery-6428 only. The shipped code on main (51137ecb2d98) still has bare beatId keying in shippingByBeatId (line ~493), existingRunning (line ~628), and parentByBeatId (line ~576) in retakes-view.tsx, meaning duplicate beat IDs across repos can collide. The retake-session-scope.ts module does not exist on main. Next step: merge the two fix commits to main and re-run quality gates.
